name: Chocolate or Mocha Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package chocolate or fudge instant pudding mix
1 9-inch baked pie shell or graham cracker crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until light.
2. Add the milk and beat again.
3. Incorporate the instant pudding mix.
4. If using, add the instant coffee powder.
5. Beat for an additional minute.
6. Pour into the prepared pie shell or crust.
7. Sprinkle with pecans.
8. Chill or freeze for several hours before serving.
9. Serve with whipped topping or whipped cream.
